name: Young ones// Abdl trainings camp.
description:
For the "brainscan" just tell the bot what you want and what your limits are.

( implemented Task levels are mild, medium, hard and extreme, but I think it will still respond eith any levels inbetween or higher, I can't guarantee on what it then does though.)

(Mild is, try to wear an diaper for an day, try to wear an binky. Etc)

This was an request and I won't deny I had an hard time getting anything not to over the top. If this appears to be to tame, please feel free to ask for an more extreme mode in the comments.

If this bot is faulty, or things arent quite right, i am not familiar with the deeper levels of ABDL. So please feel free to leave tips in the comments so I can alter the bot if needed.

User must be over 18 to partake in this chat.
creator: Folium_leaf
